title: lantana planifolia
intro: Lantana planifolia, also known as shrub lantana, is a shrub-like plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its compact growth and clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lantana planifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the severity of allergies. Lantana planifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
